## Diff 1: backend/services/google_auth_service.py (NEW FILE)

```python
# backend/services/google_auth_service.py
from app.core.config import settings
from app.models.user import User
from app.db.session import get_db

class InvalidTokenError(Exception):
    pass

class GoogleAuthService:
    """
    Handles Google OAuth token verification and user mapping.
    DEMO MODE: Accepts mock tokens for demo purposes.
    """

    def verify_token(self, token: str) -> dict:
+       if settings.DEMO_MODE and token.startswith("mock_google_"):
+           return {
+               "sub": "google_demo_id_" + token[12:],
+               "email": f"demo_{token[12:]}@gmail.com",
+               "name": "Demo Google User",
+               "picture": "https://example.com/demo-avatar.png"
+           }
+       # Production: verify with Google API
+       # from google.oauth2 import id_token
+       # return id_token.verify_oauth2_token(token, requests.Request(), settings.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)
        raise InvalidTokenError("Token verification not configured for non-demo mode")

    def find_or_create_user(self, google_payload: dict, db) -> User:
+       user = db.query(User).filter(User.google_id == google_payload["sub"]).first()
+       if user:
+           return user
+       # Check if email already registered
+       user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == google_payload["email"]).first()
+       if user:
+           # Link Google to existing account
+           user.google_id = google_payload["sub"]
+           user.google_email = google_payload["email"]
+           db.commit()
+           return user
+       # Create new user
+       new_user = User(
+           email=google_payload["email"],
+           name=google_payload["name"],
+           google_id=google_payload["sub"],
+           google_email=google_payload["email"],
+           is_active=True
+       )
+       db.add(new_user)
+       db.commit()
+       return new_user
```

## Diff 2: backend/routers/auth.py (MODIFIED — additions only)

```python
  # backend/routers/auth.py
  # ... existing imports and routes unchanged ...
  
+ from app.services.google_auth_service import GoogleAuthService, InvalidTokenError
+ from app.schemas.auth import GoogleLoginRequest
  
  # === EXISTING ROUTES (UNCHANGED) ===
  @router.post("/login")
  async def login(...): ...          # NO CHANGE
  
  @router.post("/register")  
  async def register(...): ...       # NO CHANGE
  
  @router.post("/logout")
  async def logout(...): ...         # NO CHANGE
  
  # === NEW ROUTES ===
+ @router.post("/google")
+ async def google_login(
+     request: GoogleLoginRequest,
+     db: Session = Depends(get_db)
+ ):
+     """Google OAuth login endpoint"""
+     try:
+         service = GoogleAuthService()
+         payload = service.verify_token(request.token)
+         user = service.find_or_create_user(payload, db)
+         session_token = create_session_token(user.id)
+         return {"token": session_token, "user": user.to_dict()}
+     except InvalidTokenError:
+         raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Google authentication failed")
+ 
+ @router.post("/google/link")
+ async def link_google_account(
+     request: GoogleLoginRequest,
+     current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
+     db: Session = Depends(get_db)
+ ):
+     """Link Google account to existing user"""
+     service = GoogleAuthService()
+     payload = service.verify_token(request.token)
+     current_user.google_id = payload["sub"]
+     current_user.google_email = payload["email"]
+     db.commit()
+     return {"message": "Google account linked successfully"}
+ 
+ @router.delete("/google/unlink")
+ async def unlink_google_account(
+     current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user),
+     db: Session = Depends(get_db)
+ ):
+     """Unlink Google account from user"""
+     current_user.google_id = None
+     current_user.google_email = None
+     db.commit()
+     return {"message": "Google account unlinked"}
```

## Diff 3: src/components/auth/GoogleLoginButton.tsx (NEW FILE)

```tsx
+ // src/components/auth/GoogleLoginButton.tsx
+ import React from 'react';
+ import { LoadingSpinner } from '../common/LoadingSpinner';
+ 
+ interface GoogleLoginButtonProps {
+   onClick: () => void;
+   isLoading?: boolean;
+   disabled?: boolean;
+ }
+ 
+ export const GoogleLoginButton: React.FC<GoogleLoginButtonProps> = ({
+   onClick, isLoading = false, disabled = false
+ }) => {
+   return (
+     <button
+       onClick={onClick}
+       disabled={disabled || isLoading}
+       data-testid="google-login-btn"
+       aria-label="Sign in with Google"
+       className={`
+         w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-3 px-4 py-3
+         border border-gray-300 rounded-lg bg-white
+         text-gray-700 font-medium text-sm
+         hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors
+         disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
+       `}
+     >
+       {isLoading ? (
+         <LoadingSpinner size="sm" />
+       ) : (
+         <GoogleIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
+       )}
+       <span>{isLoading ? 'Connecting to Google...' : 'Sign in with Google'}</span>
+     </button>
+   );
+ };
```
